nodes.label: Tests for update_agent tool — partial updates, atomic writes, and validation.  R
Create a baseline agent dir with config.yaml and SOUL.md for tests to mutate.
Stub get_app_config so model validation accepts only known names.
Copilot review: model must be validated against configured models before     bei
Models sometimes pass literal "null" strings while trying to omit fields.      T
skills/tool_groups must be real arrays; string placeholders are invalid.
Copilot review: if the existing config.yaml has a drifted ``name`` field,     up
Copilot review: if both config.yaml and SOUL.md are scheduled to be     written
An update from user 'alice' must never touch user 'bob's agent files.
update_agent reads through load_agent_config so all fields the loader     knows
